The question is asking which of the options is true about him. Looking at the options: (A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The passage mentions Zheng Li as a student from Dalian Marinetime University, but there's no information about Wu Jinyou's education. So this is likely false. (B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. Again, the passage doesn't mention his position at Dalian Marinetime University. He's the head of the Polar Research Institute, so this is probably incorrect. (C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers.
